assets.description: Transparent compact heated forge module icon with amber heat and teal signal accents.
assets.intended_use: Production lane icon for forge-line lane selection or status display.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation on chroma key, locally keyed to alpha, cropped, sharpened, and resized to 96x96 PNG.

assets.description: Opaque dark factory dispatch floor title art with three production lanes, queue rails, and teal signal lines.
assets.intended_use: Title card, menu background, or game splash art.

notes: Created an original mono-first dark factory raster asset pack using Codex built-in image generation only; no OpenAI SDK, Images API, API key, logos, or readable UI labels were used. Transparent icons were produced through chroma-key removal and validated for alpha corners.
